episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 353: Dominaria Remastered Previews + October Secret Lair Superdrop
episode.description: James and Derek guide you through all the latest in Magic the Gathering and MTGFinance news and products including Modern & Pioneer MTGO metagame analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and a detailed analysis of Dominaria Remastered previews and the Secret Lair December Superdrop.
